### Summary

### Checklist

- [ ] `make` passes (vet + race tests + build) and `make lint` is clean.
- [ ] Behavioral changes ship with a test that would have caught the bug / pins the feature.
- [ ] Docs/man pages/example config updated if behavior or config changed.
- [ ] No site-private data or secrets added — `scripts/check-pristine.sh` passes
      (use documentation-range placeholders; see CONTRIBUTING.md).
